console_check: Chrome headless wrote screenshot byte counts only; no application console error, uncaught exception, or failed resource line was present.
copy_review: The /public route opens the React Public Posting workspace directly, keeps public API traffic behind /api/public/..., and preserves restricted-session non-disclosure copy.
accessibility_review: Direct-route desktop and mobile renderings preserve heading hierarchy, labelled controls, keyboard-focusable buttons, and actionable API-unavailable copy when the backend is not running.
